notes: Roman poet and politician, known as the first prefect of Egypt and for his poetry; noted for an ungrateful and malicious temper in Suetonius.

docs.title: Life of Augustus
docs.author: Suetonius
docs.excerpt: … and the other, on account of his ungrateful and malicious temper, he forbad his house, and his living in any of the provinces. When, however, Gallus, being denounced by his accusers, and sentenced by the senate, was driven to the desperate extremity of laying violent hands upon himself, he
